description: Claim is about 'reduced blood loss' but available evidence measures 'hemostasis time'. Endpoint mismatch triggers gap disposition.

input.ifu_text: Device significantly reduces intraoperative blood loss.

claim_endpoint_mapping.surrogate_validity: moderate — shorter hemostasis time correlates with reduced blood loss but does not directly measure it

expected_expert_reasoning.reason: No direct measurement of blood loss volume. Hemostasis time is a surrogate endpoint with moderate validity. PMCF study should directly measure blood loss.

cer_reasoning_ledger.gap_rationale: Endpoint mismatch: claimed outcome 'blood loss' vs measured endpoint 'hemostasis time'. Surrogate validity is moderate.

writer_must_include: PMCF to measure blood loss directly
